title: LogiTrack — Enterprise Fleet Management ERP
summary: An all-in-one fleet telemetry and tracking dashboard built for logistics operators managing over 500 active transit routes.
problem: Legacy spreadsheets and high API response times for vehicle telemetry led to coordination lag, causing average logistics delays of 14% across transit lanes.
process: We refactored telemetry data ingestion using high-throughput FastAPI endpoints. Developed a dynamic, responsive React interface that streams transit updates and optimizes path schedules.
solution: Built a modular web ERP utilizing asynchronous API pooling, structured Postgres database schemas, and optimized geolocation calculations to render instantaneous routing maps.
outcome: Improved real-time shipment monitoring accuracy to 99% and slashed delivery coordinate mapping latency by 74%.

title: MedSync — Patient Booking & Clinical Portal
summary: A secure patient booking engine and records organizer designed for multi-specialty clinical operations.
problem: Patient scheduling conflicts, manual record entry, and lack of token authentication resulted in slow front-office flows and data vulnerability.
process: Designed secure JWT validation schemes and created a modular React booking calendar. Shipped a containerized Django server connected to optimized MySQL indexing boards.
solution: Successfully deployed an enterprise-grade medical portal offering secure EHR storage, real-time doctor availability calendars, and instant automated appointment confirmations.
outcome: Secured clinical operations with HIPAA-compliant standards, decreased scheduling conflicts to 0%, and reduced front-desk administrative times by 40%.
